trivia_bullets.text: Found Footage is a common from Duskmourn: House of Horror (DSK), MTG's 102nd expansion released September 27, 2024. The set is a top-down horror design set entirely within a haunted mansion ruled by demon Valgavoth, inspired by 1970s-90s slasher and haunted-house films.

Found Footage is a named, castable Artifact -- Clue (not a token). Clue tokens debuted in Shadows over Innistrad (2016); Duskmourn marks one of the first instances of a named, castable Clue in the main set. Its face-down-inspection ability synergizes with the set's Disguise and Manifest Dread mechanics.

The face-down inspection ability applies to any face-down creature an opponent controls -- including Manifest Dread permanents -- and does not use the stack. Legal in Pauper at {1} mana with a surveil-2-plus-draw payoff.

related_cards.name: Manifest Dread
related_cards.note: introduces face-down permanents in the same set; Found Footage's inspection ability applies

related_cards.name: Clue token
related_cards.note: predecessor artifact subtype Found Footage names directly

related_cards.name: Unidentified Hovership
related_cards.note: another Duskmourn Clue-producing artifact in the retro-tech vein
